headline: UFO, ROKT, and ARKX: Which Space ETF Fits Your Commercial Satellite Bet
summary: The commercial space economy has shifted from a story about government contracts to one about private revenue. Satellite broadband and earth observation companies are signing recurring contracts with insurers, defense buyers, and agricultural firms, while launch cadence keeps climbing and launch services revenue is moving away from cost-plus government work.
